1032: async function loadAuthoritativeDeploymentDiff(
1033:   env: Env,
1034:   workspaceId: string,
1035:   operationId: string | null,
1036:   reviewDiffArtifactId: string | null
1037: ): Promise<{ source: 'artifact_patch'; artifactId: string; patch: string } | null> {
1038:   const getArtifactObject = async (objectKey: string): Promise<R2ObjectBody | null> => {
1039:     const fromArtifacts = env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ? await env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS.get(objectKey) : null;
1040:     if (fromArtifacts) {
1041:       return fromArtifacts;
1042:     }
1043:     return env.SOURCE_BUNDLES ? await env.SOURCE_BUNDLES.get(objectKey) : null;
1044:   };
1045: 
1046:   if (reviewDiffArtifactId) {
1047:     const reviewArtifact = await getWorkspaceArtifactById(env.DB, workspaceId, reviewDiffArtifactId);
1048:     if (reviewArtifact && reviewArtifact.artifact.type === 'patch') {
1049:       const object = await getArtifactObject(reviewArtifact.objectKey);
1050:       if (!object) {
1051:         return null;
1052:       }
1053:       return {
1054:         source: 'artifact_patch',
1055:         artifactId: reviewDiffArtifactId,
1056:         patch: await object.text(),
1057:       };
1058:     }
1059:   }
1060: 
1061:   if (!operationId) {
1062:     return null;
1063:   }
1064: 
1065:   const operation = await getWorkspaceOperation(env.DB, workspaceId, operationId);
1066:   if (!operation || operation.type !== 'export_patch' || operation.status !== 'succeeded') {
1067:     return null;
1068:   }
1069: 
1070:   const result = asRecord(operation.result);
1071:   const artifactId = typeof result.artifactId === 'string' ? result.artifactId.trim() : '';
1072:   if (!artifactId) {
1073:     return null;
1074:   }
1075: 
1076:   const artifact = await getWorkspaceArtifactById(env.DB, workspaceId, artifactId);
1077:   if (!artifact || artifact.artifact.type !== 'patch') {
1078:     return null;
1079:   }
1080: 
1081:   const object = await getArtifactObject(artifact.objectKey);
1082:   if (!object) {
1083:     return null;
1084:   }
1085: 
1086:   return {
1087:     source: 'artifact_patch',
1088:     artifactId,
1089:     patch: await object.text(),
1090:   };
1091: }
1092: 
1093: async function buildWorkspaceDeploymentReport(
1094:   env: Env,
1095:   review: ReviewRunResponse,
1096:   payload: Record<string, unknown>,
1097:   reviewContext: ReviewContext
1098: ): Promise<ReviewReport> {
1099:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, review.workspaceId, review.deploymentId);
1100:   if (!deployment) {
1101:     throw new Error(`Deployment not found for review target ${review.deploymentId}`);
1102:   }
1103: 
1104:   const deploymentRequest = (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, review.deploymentId)) ?? {};
1105:   const deploymentEvents = await listWorkspaceDeploymentEvents(env.DB, review.workspaceId, review.deploymentId, 0, 500);
1106:   const reviewPolicy = asRecord(payload.policy);
1107:   const reviewFormat = asRecord(payload.format);
1108:   const result = asRecord(deployment.result);
1109:   const resultProvenance = asRecord(result.provenance);
1110:   const resultArtifact = asRecord(result.artifact);
1111:   const requestValidation = asRecord(deploymentRequest.validation);
1112:   const requestProvenance = asRecord(deploymentRequest.provenance);
1113:   const intentSessionContext = uniqueStrings(parseStringArray(requestProvenance.intentSessionContext)).slice(0, 8);
1114:   const provenanceTaskId = typeof resultProvenance.taskId === 'string'
1115:     ? resultProvenance.taskId
1116:     : typeof requestProvenance.taskId === 'string'
1117:       ? requestProvenance.taskId
1118:       : null;
1119:   const provenanceTask = provenanceTaskId ? await getWorkspaceTask(env.DB, review.workspaceId, provenanceTaskId) : null;
1120:   const taskResult = asRecord(provenanceTask?.result);
1121:   const severityThreshold = typeof reviewPolicy.severityThreshold === 'string' ? reviewPolicy.severityThreshold : 'low';
1122:   const maxFindings = parsePositiveInteger(reviewPolicy.maxFindings, 100, 500);
1123:   const includeProvenance = parseBoolean(reviewPolicy.includeProvenance, true);
1124:   const includeValidationEvidence = parseBoolean(reviewPolicy.includeValidationEvidence, true);
1125:   const includeMarkdownSummary = parseBoolean(reviewFormat.includeMarkdownSummary, true);
1126: 
1127:   const baseGoal =
1128:     typeof provenanceTask?.prompt === 'string' && provenanceTask.prompt.trim()
1129:       ? provenanceTask.prompt.trim()
1130:       : typeof requestProvenance.note === 'string' && requestProvenance.note.trim()
1131:         ? requestProvenance.note.trim()
1132:       : `Assess workspace deployment ${review.deploymentId} for review-first handoff readiness.`;
1133:   const baseConstraints = [
1134:     'Non-mutating review only.',
1135:     `Target limited to ${review.target.type}.`,
1136:     requestValidation.runTestsIfPresent === false
1137:       ? 'Tests were not required during deployment validation.'
1138:       : 'Tests were eligible during deployment validation.',
1139:     requestValidation.runBuildIfPresent === false
1140:       ? 'Build validation was not required during deployment validation.'
1141:       : 'Build validation was eligible during deployment validation.',
1142:   ];
1143:   const baseDecisions = [
1144:     `Deployment provider: ${deployment.provider}.`,
1145:     `Review mode: ${review.mode}.`,
1146:     provenanceTask ? `Source task model: ${provenanceTask.model}.` : '',
1147:     typeof taskResult.summary === 'string' && taskResult.summary.trim() ? `Source task summary: ${taskResult.summary.trim()}.` : '',
1148:     typeof resultProvenance.trigger === 'string'
1149:       ? `Deployment trigger: ${resultProvenance.trigger}.`
1150:       : typeof requestProvenance.trigger === 'string'
1151:         ? `Deployment trigger: ${requestProvenance.trigger}.`
1152:         : 'Deployment trigger was not recorded.',
1153:     parseStringArray(requestProvenance.sessionIds).length > 0
1154:       ? `Related Entire sessions: ${parseStringArray(requestProvenance.sessionIds).join(', ')}.`
1155:       : '',
1156:     intentSessionContext.length > 0 ? `Prompt-history context excerpts provided: ${intentSessionContext.length}.` : '',
1157:   ];
1158: 
1159:   const heuristicFindings = buildHeuristicFindings(review, deploymentEvents);
1160:   const analysisEvidence = buildEvidence(deploymentEvents, deployment, resultArtifact, true);
1161:   const provenanceOperationId = typeof resultProvenance.operationId === 'string'
1162:     ? resultProvenance.operationId
1163:     : typeof requestProvenance.operationId === 'string'
1164:       ? requestProvenance.operationId
1165:       : null;
1166:   const reviewDiffArtifactId = typeof resultArtifact.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
1167:     ? resultArtifact.reviewDiffArtifactId
1168:     : typeof resultProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
1169:       ? resultProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId
1170:       : typeof requestProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
1171:         ? requestProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId
1172:         : null;
1173:   const authoritativeDiff = await loadAuthoritativeDeploymentDiff(
1174:     env,
1175:     review.workspaceId,
1176:     provenanceOperationId,
1177:     reviewDiffArtifactId
1178:   );
1179:   let agentAnalysis: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof runWorkspaceDeploymentAgentAnalysis>> = null;
1180:   const reviewAgentEnabled = Boolean((env.AGENT_SDK_URL ?? '').trim());
1181:   const deploymentSourceBundleKey =
1182:     typeof resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey === 'string' && resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey.trim()
1183:       ? resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey.trim()
1184:       : deployment.sourceBundleKey ?? null;
1185:   const promptGoal = provenanceTask?.prompt?.trim() || baseGoal;
1186:   if (reviewAgentEnabled && deploymentSourceBundleKey) {
1187:     await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1188:       reviewId: review.id,
1189:       eventType: 'review_analysis_agent_started',
1190:       payload: {
1191:         provider: 'cloudflare_agents_sdk',
1192:         model: (env.AGENT_MODEL ?? 'claude-3-7-sonnet').trim() || 'claude-3-7-sonnet',
1193:       },
1194:     });
1195: 
1196:     agentAnalysis = await runWorkspaceDeploymentAgentAnalysis(env, {
1197:       reviewId: review.id,
1198:       workspaceId: review.workspaceId,
1199:       deploymentId: review.deploymentId,
1200:       deploymentSandboxId: `review-snapshot-${review.id}`,
1201:       sourceBundleKey: deploymentSourceBundleKey,
1202:       authoritativeDiffSnapshot: authoritativeDiff
1203:         ? {
1204:             source: authoritativeDiff.source,
1205:             artifactId: authoritativeDiff.artifactId,
1206:             patch: authoritativeDiff.patch,
1207:           }
1208:         : undefined,
1209:       goal: promptGoal,
1210:       constraints: baseConstraints,
1211:       decisions: baseDecisions.filter(Boolean),
1212:       intentSessionContext,
1213:       evidenceCatalog: analysisEvidence.map((item) => ({
1214:         id: item.id,
1215:         type: item.type,
1216:         label: item.label,
1217:         status: item.status,
1218:       })),
1219:       deploymentSummary: {
1220:         provider: deployment.provider,
1221:         deployedUrl: deployment.deployedUrl,
1222:         validationSummary: JSON.stringify(requestValidation),
1223:       },
1224:       reviewContext,
1225:       rootListing: {},
1226:       diffSnapshot: {},
1227:       onLifecycleEvent: async (eventType, eventPayload) => {
1228:         await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1229:           reviewId: review.id,
1230:           eventType,
1231:           payload: eventPayload,
1232:         });
1233:       },
1234:     });
1235: 
1236:     if (!agentAnalysis) {
1237:       throw new Error('Review analysis did not produce output.');
1238:     }
1239: 
1240:     await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1241:       reviewId: review.id,
1242:       eventType: 'review_analysis_agent_completed',
1243:       payload: {
1244:         provider: agentAnalysis.provider,
1245:         model: agentAnalysis.model,
1246:         stepsExecuted: agentAnalysis.stepsExecuted,
1247:         findingCount: agentAnalysis.findings.length,
1248:       },
1249:     });
1250:   }
1251: 
1252:   if (reviewAgentEnabled && !deploymentSourceBundleKey) {
1253:     throw new Error('Deployment snapshot unavailable; review analysis cannot proceed without source bundle.');
1254:   }
1255: 
1256:   if (reviewAgentEnabled && !agentAnalysis) {
1257:     throw new Error('Review analysis did not produce output.');
1258:   }
1259: 
1260:   const severityFloor = REVIEW_SEVERITY_RANK[severityThreshold as ReviewSeverity] ?? REVIEW_SEVERITY_RANK.low;
1261:   const mergedFindings = mergeFindings(agentAnalysis?.findings ?? [], heuristicFindings)
1262:     .filter((finding) => REVIEW_SEVERITY_RANK[finding.severity] >= severityFloor)
1263:     .sort((left, right) => REVIEW_SEVERITY_RANK[right.severity] - REVIEW_SEVERITY_RANK[left.severity])
1264:     .slice(0, maxFindings);
1265:   const agentEvidence = agentAnalysis
1266:     ? {
1267:         id: 'ev_review_agent',
1268:         type: 'analysis_agent',
1269:         label: `AI review analysis via ${agentAnalysis.provider}`,
1270:         status: 'info' as const,
1271:         metadata: {
1272:           model: agentAnalysis.model,
1273:           stepsExecuted: agentAnalysis.stepsExecuted,
1274:           usedTools: agentAnalysis.usedTools,
1275:         },
1276:       }
1277:     : null;
1278:   const evidence = buildEvidence(deploymentEvents, deployment, resultArtifact, includeValidationEvidence, agentEvidence);
1279:   const findings = mergedFindings;
1280: 
1281:   const riskLevel = deriveRiskLevel(findings, 'low');
1282:   const recommendation = deriveRecommendation(findings);
1283:   const summary = {
1284:     riskLevel,
1285:     findingCounts: {
1286:       info: findings.filter((finding) => finding.severity === 'info').length,
1287:       critical: findings.filter((finding) => finding.severity === 'critical').length,
1288:       high: findings.filter((finding) => finding.severity === 'high').length,
1289:       medium: findings.filter((finding) => finding.severity === 'medium').length,
1290:       low: findings.filter((finding) => finding.severity === 'low').length,
1291:     },
1292:     recommendation,
1293:   };
1294: 
1295:   const intent = sanitizeIntentBlock({
1296:     goal: agentAnalysis?.intent?.goal ?? baseGoal,
1297:     constraints: Array.from(new Set([...(agentAnalysis?.intent?.constraints ?? []), ...baseConstraints])),
1298:     decisions: Array.from(new Set([...(agentAnalysis?.intent?.decisions ?? []), ...baseDecisions])),
1299:   });
1300: 
1301:   const promptSummary = redactReviewText(
1302:     (typeof requestProvenance.note === 'string' ? requestProvenance.note.trim() : null) ||
1303:       `Review generated in ${review.mode} mode for deployment ${review.deploymentId}.`
1304:   );
1305:   const transcriptUrl =
1306:     typeof requestProvenance.transcriptUrl === 'string' && requestProvenance.transcriptUrl.trim()
1307:       ? requestProvenance.transcriptUrl.trim()
1308:       : null;
1309: 
1310:   const report: ReviewReport = {
1311:     summary,
1312:     findings,
1313:     summaryText: agentAnalysis?.summary,
1314:     furtherPassesLowYield: agentAnalysis?.furtherPassesLowYield,
1315:     intent,
1316:     evidence,
1317:     provenance: includeProvenance
1318:       ? {
1319:           sessionIds: parseStringArray(requestProvenance.sessionIds),
1320:           promptSummary,
1321:           transcriptUrl,
1322:           reviewContextRef: {
1323:             id: reviewContext.id,
1324:             r2Key: `review-context/${review.id}/${reviewContext.id}.json`,
1325:           },
1326:           reviewContextStats: {
1327:             totalFilesIncluded: reviewContext.stats.totalFilesIncluded,
1328:             totalBytesIncluded: reviewContext.stats.totalBytesIncluded,
1329:             estimatedTokens: reviewContext.stats.estimatedTokens,
1330:             tokenBudget: reviewContext.stats.tokenBudget,
1331:           },
1332:           outputSchemaVersion: 'v2',
1333:           passArchitecture: 'single',
1334:           validation: agentAnalysis?.validation,
1335:           furtherPassesLowYield:
1336:             typeof agentAnalysis?.furtherPassesLowYield === 'boolean'
1337:               ? {
1338:                   value: agentAnalysis.furtherPassesLowYield,
1339:                   source: 'model-self-assessment' as const,
1340:                   reliability: 'weak-signal-phase2' as const,
1341:                 }
1342:               : undefined,
1343:         }
1344:       : {
1345:           sessionIds: [],
1346:           promptSummary: null,
1347:           transcriptUrl: null,
1348:         },
1349:     markdownSummary: null,
1350:   };
1351:   if (includeMarkdownSummary) {
1352:     report.markdownSummary = buildReviewMarkdown(report);
1353:   }
1354:   return report;
1355: }

1357: async function executeReviewRun(
1358:   env: Env,
1359:   review: ReviewRunResponse,
1360:   payload: Record<string, unknown>,
1361:   reviewContext: ReviewContext
1362: ): Promise<ReviewReport> {
1363:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1364:     reviewId: review.id,
1365:     eventType: 'review_preflight_started',
1366:     payload: {
1367:       targetType: review.target.type,
1368:       mode: review.mode,
1369:     },
1370:   });
1371:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1372:     reviewId: review.id,
1373:     eventType: 'review_preflight_completed',
1374:     payload: {
1375:       ok: true,
1376:     },
1377:   });
1378:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1379:     reviewId: review.id,
1380:     eventType: 'review_analysis_started',
1381:     payload: {
1382:       deploymentId: review.deploymentId,
1383:       workspaceId: review.workspaceId,
1384:     },
1385:   });
1386: 
1387:   const target = asRecord(payload.target);
1388:   const targetType = typeof target.type === 'string' ? target.type : review.target.type;
1389:   if (targetType !== 'workspace_deployment') {
1390:     throw new Error(`Unsupported review target type: ${targetType}`);
1391:   }
1392: 
1393:   const report = await buildWorkspaceDeploymentReport(env, review, payload, reviewContext);
1394:   for (const finding of report.findings) {
1395:     await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1396:       reviewId: review.id,
1397:       eventType: 'review_finding_emitted',
1398:       payload: {
1399:         severity: finding.severity,
1400:         category: finding.category,
1401:         passType: finding.passType,
1402:         description: finding.description,
1403:       },
1404:     });
1405:   }
1406: 
1407:   return report;
1408: }
1409: 
1410: export async function processReviewRun(env: Env, reviewId: string): Promise<void> {
1411:   const claimed = await claimReviewRunForExecution(env.DB, reviewId);
1412:   if (!claimed) {
1413:     const existing = await getReviewRun(env.DB, reviewId);
1414:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
1415:       throw new QueueRetryError('Review run is already running; defer redelivery');
1416:     }
1417:     return;
1418:   }
1419: 
1420:   let review: ReviewRunResponse | null = null;
1421:   try {
1422:     review = await getReviewRun(env.DB, reviewId);
1423:     if (!review) {
1424:       return;
1425:     }
1426: 
1427:     const payload = await getReviewRunRequestPayload(env.DB, reviewId);
1428:     if (!payload) {
1429:       await updateReviewRunStatus(env.DB, reviewId, 'failed', {
1430:         errorCode: 'review_not_found',
1431:         errorMessage: 'Review request payload no longer exists',
1432:       });
1433:       await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1434:         reviewId,
1435:         eventType: 'review_failed',
1436:         payload: {
1437:           code: 'review_not_found',
1438:           message: 'Review request payload no longer exists',
1439:         },
1440:       });
1441:       return;
1442:     }
1443: 
1444:     const reviewContext = await assembleReviewContextBootstrap(env, review);
1445:     const report = await executeReviewRun(env, review, payload, reviewContext);
1446:     await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1447:       reviewId,
1448:       eventType: 'review_finalize_started',
1449:       payload: {
1450:         findingCount: report.findings.length,
1451:       },
1452:     });
1453:     await replaceReviewFindings(env.DB, reviewId, report.findings);
1454:     await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1455:       reviewId,
1456:       eventType: 'review_analysis_findings_persisted',
1457:       payload: {
1458:         findingCount: report.findings.length,
1459:       },
1460:     });
1461:     await updateReviewRunStatus(env.DB, reviewId, 'succeeded', {
1462:       report,
1463:       markdownSummary: report.markdownSummary,
1464:       errorCode: null,
1465:       errorMessage: null,
1466:     });
1467:     await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1468:       reviewId,
1469:       eventType: 'review_analysis_succeeded',
1470:       payload: {
1471:         findingCount: report.findings.length,
1472:       },
1473:     });
1474:     await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1475:       reviewId,
1476:       eventType: 'review_succeeded',
1477:       payload: {
1478:         recommendation: report.summary.recommendation,
1479:         findingCount: report.findings.length,
1480:       },
1481:     });
1482:   } catch (error) {
1483:     const message = formatReviewAnalysisError(error);
1484:     const latest = await getReviewRun(env.DB, reviewId);
1485:     const attemptCount = latest?.attemptCount ?? review?.attemptCount ?? 0;
1486: 
1487:     if ((error instanceof QueueRetryError || transientReviewFailure(message)) && attemptCount <= REVIEW_MAX_RETRIES) {
1488:       await replaceReviewFindings(env.DB, reviewId, []);
1489:       await updateReviewRunStatus(env.DB, reviewId, 'queued', {
1490:         report: null,
1491:         markdownSummary: null,
1492:         startedAt: null,
1493:         finishedAt: null,
1494:         errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
1495:         errorMessage: message,
1496:       });
1497:       await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1498:         reviewId,
1499:         eventType: 'review_retry_scheduled',
1500:         payload: {
1501:           attemptCount,
1502:           maxRetries: REVIEW_MAX_RETRIES,
1503:         },
1504:       });
1505:       throw new QueueRetryError('Review transient failure; retry requested');
1506:     }
1507:

325:     case 'completed':

342:   }
343:   return `${prefix}_${id}`;

613: function toReviewFindingRecord(value: unknown): ReviewFinding[] {
614:   if (!Array.isArray(value)) {
615:     return [];
616:   }
617: 
618:   return value.flatMap((item) => {
619:     const record = item && typeof item === 'object' && !Array.isArray(item) ? (item as Record<string, unknown>) : null;
620:     if (!record) {
621:       return [];
622:     }
623: 
624:     const severity = typeof record.severity === 'string' ? record.severity.trim() : '';
625:     const category = typeof record.category === 'string' ? record.category.trim() : '';
626:     const passType = typeof record.passType === 'string' ? record.passType.trim() : '';
627:     const description = typeof record.description === 'string' ? record.description.trim() : '';
628:     const suggestedFix = typeof record.suggestedFix === 'string' ? record.suggestedFix.trim() : '';
629:     if (!severity || !category || !passType || !description) {
630:       return [];
631:     }
632: 
633:     if (!['info', 'low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical'].includes(severity)) {
634:       return [];
635:     }
636:     if (!['security', 'logic', 'style', 'breaking-change'].includes(category)) {
637:       return [];
638:     }
639:     if (!['single', 'security', 'logic', 'style', 'breaking-change'].includes(passType)) {
640:       return [];
641:     }
642: 
643:     const locationsRaw = Array.isArray(record.locations) ? record.locations : [];
644:     const locations = locationsRaw.flatMap((locationItem) => {
645:       const location =
646:         locationItem && typeof locationItem === 'object' && !Array.isArray(locationItem)
647:           ? (locationItem as Record<string, unknown>)
648:           : null;
649:       if (!location) {
650:         return [];
651:       }
652: 
653:       const filePath = typeof location.filePath === 'string' ? location.filePath.trim() : '';
654:       if (!filePath) {
655:         return [];
656:       }
657:       const startLine = location.startLine;
658:       const endLine = location.endLine;
659:       const nullRange = startLine === null && endLine === null;
660:       const numericRange =
661:         typeof startLine === 'number' &&
662:         Number.isInteger(startLine) &&
663:         startLine > 0 &&
664:         typeof endLine === 'number' &&
665:         Number.isInteger(endLine) &&
666:         endLine >= startLine;
667:       if (!nullRange && !numericRange) {
668:         return [];
669:       }
670: 
671:       return [
672:         {
673:           filePath,
674:           startLine: nullRange ? null : (startLine as number),
675:           endLine: nullRange ? null : (endLine as number),
676:         },
677:       ];
678:     });
679: 
680:     if (locations.length === 0) {
681:       return [];
682:     }
683: 
684:     return [
685:       {
686:         severity: severity as ReviewFinding['severity'],
687:         category: category as ReviewFinding['category'],
688:         passType: passType as ReviewFinding['passType'],
689:         locations,
690:         description,
691:         suggestedFix,
692:       },
693:     ];
694:   });
695: }

697: function toReviewRunResponse(record: ReviewRunRecord): ReviewRunResponse {
698:   const provenance = parseJsonOrFallback(record.provenance_json, {});
699:   const report = parseJsonOrFallback(record.report_json, null) as ReviewReport | null;
700:   const reportHasProvenance = Boolean(report?.provenance);
701: 
702:   const response: ReviewRunResponse = {
703:     id: record.id,
704:     workspaceId: record.workspace_id,
705:     deploymentId: record.deployment_id,
706:     target: {
707:       type: record.target_type,
708:       workspaceId: record.workspace_id,
709:       deploymentId: record.deployment_id,
710:     },
711:     mode: record.mode,
712:     status: record.status,
713:     idempotencyKey: record.idempotency_key,
714:     attemptCount: record.attempt_count,
715:     startedAt: record.started_at,
716:     finishedAt: record.finished_at,
717:     createdAt: record.created_at,
718:     updatedAt: record.updated_at,
719:     findings: toReviewFindingRecord(report?.findings),
720:     evidence: Array.isArray(report?.evidence) ? report.evidence : [],
721:     provenance: {
722:       sessionIds:
723:         report?.provenance && Array.isArray(report.provenance.sessionIds) ? report.provenance.sessionIds : [],
724:       promptSummary:
725:         report?.provenance && typeof report.provenance.promptSummary === 'string'
726:           ? report.provenance.promptSummary
727:           : !reportHasProvenance && typeof (provenance as Record<string, unknown>).promptSummary === 'string'
728:             ? ((provenance as Record<string, unknown>).promptSummary as string)
729:             : null,
730:       transcriptUrl:
731:         report?.provenance && typeof report.provenance.transcriptUrl === 'string'
732:           ? report.provenance.transcriptUrl
733:           : null,
734:       reviewContextRef:
735:         report?.provenance && report.provenance.reviewContextRef && typeof report.provenance.reviewContextRef === 'object'
736:           ? (report.provenance.reviewContextRef as ReviewContextRef)
737:           : null,
738:       reviewContextStats:
739:         report?.provenance && report.provenance.reviewContextStats && typeof report.provenance.reviewContextStats === 'object'
740:           ? report.provenance.reviewContextStats
741:           : undefined,
742:     },
743:     markdownSummary: record.markdown_summary,
744:   };
745: 
746:   if (report?.summary) {
747:     response.summary = report.summary;
748:   }
749:   if (typeof report?.summaryText === 'string') {
750:     response.summaryText = report.summaryText;
751:   }
752:   if (typeof report?.furtherPassesLowYield === 'boolean') {
753:     response.furtherPassesLowYield = report.furtherPassesLowYield;
754:   }
755:   if (report?.intent) {
756:     response.intent = report.intent;
757:   }
758:   if (record.error_code && record.error_message) {
759:     response.error = {
760:       code: record.error_code,
761:       message: record.error_message,
762:     };
763:   }
764: 
765:   return response;
766: }

768: /**
769:  * Create a new checkpoint job in the database
770:  */
771: export async function createCheckpointJob(
772:   db: D1Database,
773:   input: CreateCheckpointJobInput
774: ): Promise<JobResponse> {
775:   const result = await db
776:     .prepare(
777:       `INSERT INTO jobs (
778:          id,
779:          prompt,
780:          model,
781:          status,
782:          phase,
783:          source_type,
784:          checkpoint_id,
785:          commit_sha,
786:          source_ref,
787:          source_project_root,
788:          build_run_tests_if_present,
789:          build_run_lint_if_present,
790:          source_bundle_key,
791:          source_bundle_sha256,
792:          source_bundle_bytes
793:        )
794:        VALUES (?, ?, 'checkpoint', 'queued', 'queued', 'checkpoint', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
795:        RETURNING *`
796:     )
797:     .bind(
798:       input.id,
799:       input.prompt,
800:       input.checkpointId,
801:       input.commitSha,
802:       input.sourceRef ?? null,
803:       input.sourceProjectRoot ?? null,
804:       input.buildRunTestsIfPresent ? 1 : 0,
805:       input.buildRunLintIfPresent ? 1 : 0,
806:       input.sourceBundleKey,
807:       input.sourceBundleSha256,
808:       input.sourceBundleBytes
809:     )
810:     .first<JobRecord>();
811: 
812:   if (!result) {
813:     throw new Error('Failed to create checkpoint job');
814:   }
815: 
816:   return toJobResponse(result);
817: }

854: /**
855:  * Atomically claim a queued checkpoint job for execution.
856:  * Returns true when claim succeeds, false when another worker already claimed.
857:  */
858: export async function claimQueuedCheckpointJob(db: D1Database, id: string): Promise<boolean> {
859:   const result = await db
860:     .prepare(
861:       `UPDATE jobs
862:        SET status = 'running',
863:            phase = 'building',
864:            started_at = ?,
865:            error_message = NULL,
866:            error_code = NULL
867:        WHERE id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
868:     )
869:     .bind(new Date().toISOString(), id)
870:     .run();
871: 
872:   const changes = Number((result as { meta?: { changes?: number } }).meta?.changes ?? 0);
873:   return changes > 0;
874: }

876: /**
877:  * Append a sequenced job event and return its sequence number.
878:  */
879: export async function appendJobEvent(
880:   db: D1Database,
881:   input: {
882:     jobId: string;
883:     attemptNo?: number;
884:     eventType: string;
885:     phase: JobPhase;
886:     payload: unknown;
887:   }
888: ): Promise<number> {
889:   const sequenceResult = await db
890:     .prepare('UPDATE jobs SET last_event_seq = last_event_seq + 1 WHERE id = ? RETURNING last_event_seq')
891:     .bind(input.jobId)
892:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
893: 
894:   if (!sequenceResult) {
895:     throw new Error(`Failed to allocate event sequence for job ${input.jobId}`);
896:   }
897: 
898:   const seq = Number(sequenceResult.last_event_seq);
899:   await db
900:     .prepare(
901:       `INSERT INTO job_events (job_id, attempt_no, seq, event_type, phase, payload_json)
902:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
903:     )
904:     .bind(
905:       input.jobId,
906:       input.attemptNo ?? 0,
907:       seq,
908:       input.eventType,
909:       input.phase,
910:       JSON.stringify(input.payload)
911:     )
912:     .run();
913: 
914:   return seq;
915: }

917: /**
918:  * List persisted job events from a given sequence.
919:  */
920: export async function listJobEvents(
921:   db: D1Database,
922:   jobId: string,
923:   fromExclusive = 0,
924:   limit = 500
925: ): Promise<JobEventItem[]> {
926:   const result = await db
927:     .prepare(
928:       `SELECT id, job_id, attempt_no, seq, event_type, phase, payload_json, created_at
929:        FROM job_events
930:        WHERE job_id = ? AND seq > ?
931:        ORDER BY seq ASC
932:        LIMIT ?`
933:     )
934:     .bind(jobId, fromExclusive, limit)
935:     .all<JobEventRecord>();
936: 
937:   return result.results.map((row) => {
938:     let payload: unknown;
939:     try {
940:       payload = JSON.parse(row.payload_json);
941:     } catch {
942:       payload = { raw: row.payload_json };
943:     }
944: 
945:     return {
946:       seq: row.seq,
947:       eventType: row.event_type,
948:       phase: row.phase,
949:       payload,
950:       createdAt: row.created_at,
951:     };
952:   });
953: }

955: /**
956:  * Update job status
957:  */
958: export async function updateJobStatus(
959:   db: D1Database,
960:   id: string,
961:   status: JobStatus,
962:   additionalFields?: {
963:     phase?: JobPhase;
964:     started_at?: string | null;
965:     completed_at?: string | null;
966:     cancel_requested_at?: string | null;
967:     cancelled_at?: string | null;
968:     preview_url?: string;
969:     deployed_url?: string;
970:     code_url?: string;
971:     code_zip_url?: string;
972:     error_message?: string | null;
973:     error_code?: string | null;
974:     retry_count?: number;
975:     file_count?: number;
976:     // Metrics fields
977:     prompt_tokens?: number;
978:     completion_tokens?: number;
979:     total_tokens?: number;
980:     cost?: number;
981:     llm_latency_ms?: number;
982:     install_duration_ms?: number;
983:     build_duration_ms?: number;
984:     deploy_duration_ms?: number;
985:     total_duration_ms?: number;
986:     lines_of_code?: number;
987:   }
988: ): Promise<void> {
989:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?'];
990:   const values: (string | number | null)[] = [status];
991: 
992:   if (additionalFields) {
993:     if (additionalFields.phase !== undefined) {
994:       updates.push('phase = ?');
995:       values.push(additionalFields.phase);
996:     }
997:     if (additionalFields.started_at !== undefined) {
998:       updates.push('started_at = ?');
999:       values.push(additionalFields.started_at);
1000:     }
1001:     if (additionalFields.completed_at !== undefined) {
1002:       updates.push('completed_at = ?');
1003:       values.push(additionalFields.completed_at);
1004:     }
1005:     if (additionalFields.cancel_requested_at !== undefined) {
1006:       updates.push('cancel_requested_at = ?');
1007:       values.push(additionalFields.cancel_requested_at);
1008:     }
1009:     if (additionalFields.cancelled_at !== undefined) {
1010:       updates.push('cancelled_at = ?');
1011:       values.push(additionalFields.cancelled_at);
1012:     }
1013:     if (additionalFields.preview_url !== undefined) {
1014:       updates.push('preview_url = ?');
1015:       values.push(additionalFields.preview_url);
1016:     }
1017:     if (additionalFields.deployed_url !== undefined) {
1018:       updates.push('deployed_url = ?');
1019:       values.push(additionalFields.deployed_url);
1020:     }
1021:     if (additionalFields.code_url !== undefined) {
1022:       updates.push('code_url = ?');
1023:       values.push(additionalFields.code_url);
1024:     }
1025:     if (additionalFields.code_zip_url !== undefined) {
1026:       updates.push('code_zip_url = ?');
1027:       values.push(additionalFields.code_zip_url);
1028:     }
1029:     if (additionalFields.error_message !== undefined) {
1030:       updates.push('error_message = ?');
1031:       values.push(additionalFields.error_message);
1032:     }
1033:     if (additionalFields.error_code !== undefined) {
1034:       updates.push('error_code = ?');
1035:       values.push(additionalFields.error_code);
1036:     }
1037:     if (additionalFields.retry_count !== undefined) {
1038:       updates.push('retry_count = ?');
1039:       values.push(additionalFields.retry_count);
1040:     }
1041:     if (additionalFields.file_count !== undefined) {
1042:       updates.push('file_count = ?');
1043:       values.push(additionalFields.file_count);
1044:     }
1045:     // Metrics fields
1046:     if (additionalFields.prompt_tokens !== undefined) {
1047:       updates.push('prompt_tokens = ?');
1048:       values.push(additionalFields.prompt_tokens);
1049:     }
1050:     if (additionalFields.completion_tokens !== undefined) {
1051:       updates.push('completion_tokens = ?');
1052:       values.push(additionalFields.completion_tokens);
1053:     }
1054:     if (additionalFields.total_tokens !== undefined) {
1055:       updates.push('total_tokens = ?');
1056:       values.push(additionalFields.total_tokens);
1057:     }
1058:     if (additionalFields.cost !== undefined) {
1059:       updates.push('cost = ?');
1060:       values.push(additionalFields.cost);
1061:     }
1062:     if (additionalFields.llm_latency_ms !== undefined) {
1063:       updates.push('llm_latency_ms = ?');
1064:       values.push(additionalFields.llm_latency_ms);
1065:     }
1066:     if (additionalFields.install_duration_ms !== undefined) {
1067:       updates.push('install_duration_ms = ?');
1068:       values.push(additionalFields.install_duration_ms);
1069:     }
1070:     if (additionalFields.build_duration_ms !== undefined) {
1071:       updates.push('build_duration_ms = ?');
1072:       values.push(additionalFields.build_duration_ms);
1073:     }
1074:     if (additionalFields.deploy_duration_ms !== undefined) {
1075:       updates.push('deploy_duration_ms = ?');
1076:       values.push(additionalFields.deploy_duration_ms);
1077:     }
1078:     if (additionalFields.total_duration_ms !== undefined) {
1079:       updates.push('total_duration_ms = ?');
1080:       values.push(additionalFields.total_duration_ms);
1081:     }
1082:     if (additionalFields.lines_of_code !== undefined) {
1083:       updates.push('lines_of_code = ?');
1084:       values.push(additionalFields.lines_of_code);
1085:     }
1086:   }
1087: 
1088:   values.push(id);
1089: 
1090:   await db
1091:     .prepare(`UPDATE jobs SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`)
1092:     .bind(...values)
1093:     .run();
1094: }

1169: /**
1170:  * Update workspace status and selected metadata.
1171:  */
1172: export async function updateWorkspaceStatus(
1173:   db: D1Database,
1174:   id: string,
1175:   status: WorkspaceStatus,
1176:   additionalFields?: {
1177:     baseline_ready?: number;
1178:     deleted_at?: string | null;
1179:     error_code?: string | null;
1180:     error_message?: string | null;
1181:   },
1182:   options?: {
1183:     ifNotDeleted?: boolean;
1184:   }
1185: ): Promise<boolean> {
1186:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1187:   const values: (string | number | null)[] = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1188: 
1189:   if (additionalFields) {
1190:     if (additionalFields.baseline_ready !== undefined) {
1191:       updates.push('baseline_ready = ?');
1192:       values.push(additionalFields.baseline_ready);
1193:     }
1194:     if (additionalFields.deleted_at !== undefined) {
1195:       updates.push('deleted_at = ?');
1196:       values.push(additionalFields.deleted_at);
1197:     }
1198:     if (additionalFields.error_code !== undefined) {
1199:       updates.push('error_code = ?');
1200:       values.push(additionalFields.error_code);
1201:     }
1202:     if (additionalFields.error_message !== undefined) {
1203:       updates.push('error_message = ?');
1204:       values.push(additionalFields.error_message);
1205:     }
1206:   }
1207: 
1208:   values.push(id);
1209: 
1210:   let whereClause = 'id = ?';
1211:   if (options?.ifNotDeleted) {
1212:     whereClause += " AND status != 'deleted'";
1213:   }
1214: 
1215:   const result = await db
1216:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspaces SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
1217:     .bind(...values)
1218:     .run();
1219: 
1220:   return Number(result.meta.changes ?? 0) > 0;
1221: }

1270: /**
1271:  * Append a sequenced workspace event and return sequence number.
1272:  */
1273: export async function appendWorkspaceEvent(
1274:   db: D1Database,
1275:   input: {
1276:     workspaceId: string;
1277:     eventType: string;
1278:     payload: unknown;
1279:   }
1280: ): Promise<number> {
1281:   const sequenceResult = await db
1282:     .prepare('UPDATE workspaces SET last_event_seq = last_event_seq + 1 WHERE id = ? RETURNING last_event_seq')
1283:     .bind(input.workspaceId)
1284:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
1285: 
1286:   if (!sequenceResult) {
1287:     throw new Error(`Failed to allocate event sequence for workspace ${input.workspaceId}`);
1288:   }
1289: 
1290:   const seq = Number(sequenceResult.last_event_seq);
1291:   await db
1292:     .prepare(
1293:       `INSERT INTO workspace_events (workspace_id, seq, event_type, payload_json)
1294:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)`
1295:     )
1296:     .bind(input.workspaceId, seq, input.eventType, JSON.stringify(input.payload))
1297:     .run();
1298: 
1299:   return seq;
1300: }

1302: /**
1303:  * List persisted workspace events from a given sequence.
1304:  */
1305: export async function listWorkspaceEvents(
1306:   db: D1Database,
1307:   workspaceId: string,
1308:   fromExclusive = 0,
1309:   limit = 500
1310: ): Promise<WorkspaceEventItem[]> {
1311:   const result = await db
1312:     .prepare(
1313:       `SELECT seq, event_type, payload_json, created_at
1314:        FROM workspace_events
1315:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND seq > ?
1316:        ORDER BY seq ASC
1317:        LIMIT ?`
1318:     )
1319:     .bind(workspaceId, fromExclusive, limit)
1320:     .all<WorkspaceEventRecord>();
1321: 
1322:   return result.results.map((row) => {
1323:     let payload: unknown;
1324:     try {
1325:       payload = JSON.parse(row.payload_json);
1326:     } catch {
1327:       payload = { raw: row.payload_json };
1328:     }
1329: 
1330:     return {
1331:       seq: row.seq,
1332:       eventType: row.event_type,
1333:       payload,
1334:       createdAt: row.created_at,
1335:     };
1336:   });
1337: }

1339: export async function createWorkspaceOperation(
1340:   db: D1Database,
1341:   input: CreateWorkspaceOperationInput
1342: ): Promise<{ operation: WorkspaceOperationResponse; reused: boolean }> {
1343:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
1344:   const existingIdempotency = await db
1345:     .prepare(
1346:       `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1347:        FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1348:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1349:        LIMIT 1`
1350:     )
1351:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1352:     .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1353: 
1354:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
1355:     if (existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1356:       throw new WorkspaceIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey, input.type);
1357:     }
1358: 
1359:     const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, existingIdempotency.operation_id);
1360:     if (!existingOperation) {
1361:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${existingIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1362:     }
1363:     return { operation: existingOperation, reused: true };
1364:   }
1365: 
1366:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1367:     await db
1368:       .prepare(
1369:         `DELETE FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1370:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?`
1371:       )
1372:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1373:       .run();
1374:   }
1375: 
1376:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
1377:   const operationId = input.id;
1378: 
1379:   const operationRecord = await db
1380:     .prepare(
1381:       `INSERT INTO workspace_operations (
1382:          id,
1383:          workspace_id,
1384:          type,
1385:          status,
1386:          actor_id,
1387:          auth_principal_json,
1388:          request_payload_json,
1389:          request_payload_sha256,
1390:          idempotency_key,
1391:          warnings_json
1392:        )
1393:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, '[]')
1394:        RETURNING *`
1395:     )
1396:     .bind(
1397:       operationId,
1398:       input.workspaceId,
1399:       input.type,
1400:       input.actorId ?? null,
1401:       JSON.stringify(input.authPrincipal ?? {}),
1402:       JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
1403:       input.requestPayloadSha256,
1404:       input.idempotencyKey
1405:     )
1406:     .first<WorkspaceOperationRecord>();
1407: 
1408:   if (!operationRecord) {
1409:     throw new Error('Failed to create workspace operation');
1410:   }
1411: 
1412:   try {
1413:     await db
1414:       .prepare(
1415:         `INSERT INTO workspace_operation_idempotency (
1416:            id,
1417:            workspace_id,
1418:            operation_type,
1419:            idempotency_key,
1420:            operation_id,
1421:            request_payload_sha256,
1422:            expires_at
1423:          )
1424:          VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
1425:       )
1426:       .bind(
1427:         generatePrefixedId('wopk'),
1428:         input.workspaceId,
1429:         input.type,
1430:         input.idempotencyKey,
1431:         operationId,
1432:         input.requestPayloadSha256,
1433:         expiresAt
1434:       )
1435:       .run();
1436:   } catch (error) {
1437:     if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
1438:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1439:       throw error;
1440:     }
1441: 
1442:     const concurrentIdempotency = await db
1443:       .prepare(
1444:         `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1445:          FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1446:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1447:          LIMIT 1`
1448:       )
1449:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1450:       .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1451: 
1452:     if (!concurrentIdempotency || concurrentIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1453:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1454:       throw new Error('Idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
1455:     }
1456:     if (concurrentIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1457:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1458:       throw new WorkspaceIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey, input.type);
1459:     }
1460: 
1461:     const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, concurrentIdempotency.operation_id);
1462:     if (!existingOperation) {
1463:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1464:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${concurrentIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1465:     }
1466:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1467:     return { operation: existingOperation, reused: true };
1468:   }
1469: 
1470:   return { operation: toWorkspaceOperationResponse(operationRecord), reused: false };
1471: }
1472: 
1473: export async function getWorkspaceOperation(
1474:   db: D1Database,
1475:   workspaceId: string,
1476:   operationId: string
1477: ): Promise<WorkspaceOperationResponse | null> {
1478:   const result = await db
1479:     .prepare('SELECT * FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ?')
1480:     .bind(operationId, workspaceId)
1481:     .first<WorkspaceOperationRecord>();
1482: 
1483:   if (!result) {
1484:     return null;
1485:   }
1486: 
1487:   return toWorkspaceOperationResponse(result);
1488: }

1490: export async function claimWorkspaceOperationForExecution(
1491:   db: D1Database,
1492:   workspaceId: string,
1493:   operationId: string
1494: ): Promise<boolean> {
1495:   const startedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1496:   const result = await db
1497:     .prepare(
1498:       `UPDATE workspace_operations
1499:        SET status = 'running',
1500:            started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?),
1501:            updated_at = ?
1502:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
1503:     )
1504:     .bind(startedAt, startedAt, operationId, workspaceId)
1505:     .run();
1506: 
1507:   return (result.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0;
1508: }

1510: export async function updateWorkspaceOperationStatus(
1511:   db: D1Database,
1512:   operationId: string,
1513:   status: WorkspaceOperationStatus,
1514:   options?: {
1515:     result?: unknown;
1516:     warnings?: unknown[];
1517:     errorCode?: string | null;
1518:     errorClass?: string | null;
1519:     errorMessage?: string | null;
1520:     errorDetails?: unknown;
1521:     startedAt?: string | null;
1522:     finishedAt?: string | null;
1523:   }
1524: ): Promise<void> {
1525:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1526:   const values: Array<string | number | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1527: 
1528:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
1529:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
1530:     values.push(options.startedAt);
1531:   }
1532:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
1533:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
1534:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
1535:   }
1536:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
1537:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
1538:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
1539:   }
1540:   if (options?.warnings !== undefined) {
1541:     updates.push('warnings_json = ?');
1542:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.warnings));
1543:   }
1544:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
1545:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
1546:     values.push(options.errorCode);
1547:   }
1548:   if (options?.errorClass !== undefined) {
1549:     updates.push('error_class = ?');
1550:     values.push(options.errorClass);
1551:   }
1552:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
1553:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
1554:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
1555:   }
1556:   if (options?.errorDetails !== undefined) {
1557:     updates.push('error_details_json = ?');
1558:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.errorDetails));
1559:   }
1560:   if (status === 'running') {
1561:     updates.push('started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?)');
1562:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1563:   }
1564:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed') {
1565:     updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
1566:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1567:     updates.push('duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL OR COALESCE(finished_at, ?) IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(COALESCE(finished_at, ?)) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END');
1568:     const finishedAtForDuration = new Date().toISOString();
1569:     values.push(finishedAtForDuration, finishedAtForDuration);
1570:   }
1571: 
1572:   values.push(operationId);
1573: 
1574:   await db
1575:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_operations SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`)
1576:     .bind(...values)
1577:     .run();
1578: }

1673: export async function createWorkspaceTask(
1674:   db: D1Database,

1539: export async function runReviewInlineWithRetries(env: Env, reviewId: string, maxCycles = 4): Promise<void> {
1540:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
1541:     try {
1542:       await processReviewRun(env, reviewId);
1543:     } catch {
1544:       // Retry scheduling is inferred from persisted status.
1545:     }

1548:     if (!latest) {
1549:       return;
1550:     }
1551:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
1552:       return;

1555:       return;

1897: export async function updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(
1898:   db: D1Database,
1899:   taskId: string,
1900:   status: WorkspaceTaskStatus,
1901:   options?: {
1902:     workspaceId?: string;
1903:     result?: unknown;
1904:     errorCode?: string | null;
1905:     errorMessage?: string | null;
1906:     startedAt?: string | null;
1907:     finishedAt?: string | null;
1908:   }
1909: ): Promise<void> {
1910:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1911:   const values: Array<string | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1912: 
1913:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
1914:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
1915:     values.push(options.startedAt);
1916:   }
1917: 
1918:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
1919:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
1920:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
1921:   }
1922: 
1923:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
1924:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
1925:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
1926:   }
1927: 
1928:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
1929:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
1930:     values.push(options.errorCode);
1931:   }
1932: 
1933:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
1934:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
1935:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
1936:   }
1937: 
1938:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed' || status === 'cancelled') {
1939:     updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
1940:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1941:   }
1942: 
1943:   values.push(taskId);
1944:   let whereClause = 'id = ?';
1945:   if (options?.workspaceId) {
1946:     whereClause += ' AND workspace_id = ?';
1947:     values.push(options.workspaceId);
1948:   }
1949: 
1950:   await db
1951:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_tasks SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
1952:     .bind(...values)
1953:     .run();
1954: }

1956: export async function requestWorkspaceTaskCancel(
1957:   db: D1Database,
1958:   workspaceId: string,
1959:   taskId: string
1960: ): Promise<{ task: WorkspaceTaskResponse | null; updated: boolean }> {
1961:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
1962:   const queuedResult = await db
1963:     .prepare(
1964:       `UPDATE workspace_tasks
1965:        SET status = 'cancelled',
1966:            cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
1967:            finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
1968:            error_code = NULL,
1969:            error_message = NULL,
1970:            updated_at = ?
1971:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
1972:     )
1973:     .bind(now, now, now, taskId, workspaceId)
1974:     .run();
1975: 
1976:   const runningResult = await db
1977:     .prepare(
1978:       `UPDATE workspace_tasks
1979:        SET cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
1980:            updated_at = ?
1981:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'running' AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
1982:     )
1983:     .bind(now, now, taskId, workspaceId)
1984:     .run();
1985: 
1986:   const task = await getWorkspaceTask(db, workspaceId, taskId);
1987:   return {
1988:     task,
1989:     updated: (queuedResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0 || (runningResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0,
1990:   };
1991: }

2018:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`

2080: export async function createWorkspaceDeployment(
2081:   db: D1Database,
2082:   input: CreateWorkspaceDeploymentInput
2083: ): Promise<{ deployment: WorkspaceDeploymentResponse; reused: boolean }> {
2084:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2085:   const acceptedHashes = new Set([input.requestPayloadSha256, ...(input.requestPayloadSha256Aliases ?? [])]);
2086:   const existingIdempotency = await db
2087:     .prepare(
2088:       `SELECT deployment_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2089:        FROM workspace_deployment_idempotency
2090:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2091:        LIMIT 1`
2092:     )
2093:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2094:     .first<{ deployment_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2095: 
2096:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
2097:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256)) {
2098:       throw new WorkspaceDeploymentIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2099:     }
2100: 
2101:     const existingDeployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(db, input.workspaceId, existingIdempotency.deployment_id);
2102:     if (!existingDeployment) {
2103:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing deployment ${existingIdempotency.deployment_id}`);
2104:     }
2105: 
2106:     return { deployment: existingDeployment, reused: true };
2107:   }
2108: 
2109:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
2110:     await db
2111:       .prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployment_idempotency WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?')
2112:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2113:       .run();
2114:   }
2115: 
2116:   const idempotencyWindowStart = new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2117:   const existingDeploymentByKey = await db
2118:     .prepare(
2119:       `SELECT *
2120:        FROM workspace_deployments
2121:        WHERE workspace_id = ?
2122:          AND idempotency_key = ?
2123:          AND julianday(created_at) >= julianday(?)
2124:        ORDER BY created_at DESC
2125:        LIMIT 1`
2126:     )
2127:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey, idempotencyWindowStart)
2128:     .first<WorkspaceDeploymentRecord>();
2129: 
2130:   if (existingDeploymentByKey) {
2131:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingDeploymentByKey.request_payload_sha256)) {
2132:       throw new WorkspaceDeploymentIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2133:     }
2134: 
2135:     const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2136:     try {
2137:       await db
2138:         .prepare(
2139:           `INSERT INTO workspace_deployment_idempotency (
2140:              id,
2141:              workspace_id,
2142:              idempotency_key,
2143:              deployment_id,
2144:              request_payload_sha256,
2145:              expires_at
2146:            )
2147:            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2148:         )
2149:         .bind(
2150:           generatePrefixedId('wdep'),
2151:           input.workspaceId,
2152:           input.idempotencyKey,
2153:           existingDeploymentByKey.id,
2154:           input.requestPayloadSha256,
2155:           expiresAt
2156:         )
2157:         .run();
2158:     } catch (error) {
2159:       if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
2160:         throw error;
2161:       }
2162:     }
2163: 
2164:     return { deployment: toWorkspaceDeploymentResponse(existingDeploymentByKey), reused: true };
2165:   }
2166: 
2167:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2168:   const deploymentRecord = await db
2169:     .prepare(
2170:       `INSERT INTO workspace_deployments (
2171:          id,
2172:          workspace_id,
2173:          status,
2174:          provider,
2175:          idempotency_key,
2176:          request_payload_json,
2177:          request_payload_sha256,
2178:          max_retries,
2179:          provenance_json,
2180:          created_at,
2181:          updated_at
2182:        )
2183:        VALUES (?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
2184:        RETURNING *`
2185:     )
2186:     .bind(
2187:       input.id,
2188:       input.workspaceId,
2189:       input.provider,
2190:       input.idempotencyKey,
2191:       JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
2192:       input.requestPayloadSha256,
2193:       input.maxRetries,
2194:       JSON.stringify(input.provenance ?? {}),
2195:       now,
2196:       now
2197:     )
2198:     .first<WorkspaceDeploymentRecord>();
2199: 
2200:   if (!deploymentRecord) {
2201:     throw new Error('Failed to create workspace deployment');
2202:   }
2203: 
2204:   try {
2205:     await db
2206:       .prepare(
2207:         `INSERT INTO workspace_deployment_idempotency (
2208:            id,
2209:            workspace_id,
2210:            idempotency_key,
2211:            deployment_id,
2212:            request_payload_sha256,
2213:            expires_at
2214:          )
2215:          VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2216:       )
2217:       .bind(
2218:         generatePrefixedId('wdep'),
2219:         input.workspaceId,
2220:         input.idempotencyKey,
2221:         input.id,
2222:         input.requestPayloadSha256,
2223:         expiresAt
2224:       )
2225:       .run();
2226:   } catch (error) {
2227:     if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
2228:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2229:       throw error;
2230:     }
2231: 
2232:     const concurrent = await db
2233:       .prepare(
2234:         `SELECT deployment_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2235:          FROM workspace_deployment_idempotency
2236:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2237:          LIMIT 1`
2238:       )
2239:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2240:       .first<{ deployment_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2241: 
2242:     if (!concurrent || concurrent.expires_at <= now) {
2243:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2244:       throw new Error('Deployment idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
2245:     }
2246: 
2247:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(concurrent.request_payload_sha256)) {
2248:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2249:       throw new WorkspaceDeploymentIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2250:     }
2251: 
2252:     const existingDeployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(db, input.workspaceId, concurrent.deployment_id);
2253:     if (!existingDeployment) {
2254:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2255:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing deployment ${concurrent.deployment_id}`);
2256:     }
2257: 
2258:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2259:     return { deployment: existingDeployment, reused: true };
2260:   }
2261: 
2262:   return { deployment: toWorkspaceDeploymentResponse(deploymentRecord), reused: false };
2263: }
2264:

2327: export async function updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(
2328:   db: D1Database,
2329:   deploymentId: string,
2330:   status: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus,
2331:   options?: {
2332:     workspaceId?: string;
2333:     result?: unknown;
2334:     toolchain?: WorkspaceToolchainProfile | null;
2335:     dependencyCacheKey?: string | null;
2336:     dependencyCacheHit?: boolean;
2337:     remediations?: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[];
2338:     errorCode?: string | null;
2339:     errorMessage?: string | null;
2340:     sourceSnapshotSha256?: string | null;
2341:     sourceBundleKey?: string | null;
2342:     deployedUrl?: string | null;
2343:     providerDeploymentId?: string | null;
2344:     cancelRequestedAt?: string | null;
2345:     startedAt?: string | null;
2346:     finishedAt?: string | null;
2347:   }
2348: ): Promise<void> {
2349:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
2350:   const values: Array<string | number | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
2351:   let explicitFinishedAt: string | null | undefined;
2352: 
2353:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
2354:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
2355:     values.push(options.startedAt);
2356:   }
2357:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
2358:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
2359:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
2360:     explicitFinishedAt = options.finishedAt;
2361:   }
2362:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
2363:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
2364:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
2365:   }
2366:   if (options?.toolchain !== undefined) {
2367:     updates.push('toolchain_json = ?');
2368:     values.push(options.toolchain ? JSON.stringify(options.toolchain) : null);
2369:   }
2370:   if (options?.dependencyCacheKey !== undefined) {
2371:     updates.push('dependency_cache_key = ?');
2372:     values.push(options.dependencyCacheKey);
2373:   }
2374:   if (options?.dependencyCacheHit !== undefined) {
2375:     updates.push('dependency_cache_hit = ?');
2376:     values.push(options.dependencyCacheHit ? 1 : 0);
2377:   }
2378:   if (options?.remediations !== undefined) {
2379:     updates.push('remediations_json = ?');
2380:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.remediations));
2381:   }
2382:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
2383:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
2384:     values.push(options.errorCode);
2385:   }
2386:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
2387:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
2388:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
2389:   }
2390:   if (options?.sourceSnapshotSha256 !== undefined) {
2391:     updates.push('source_snapshot_sha256 = ?');
2392:     values.push(options.sourceSnapshotSha256);
2393:   }
2394:   if (options?.sourceBundleKey !== undefined) {
2395:     updates.push('source_bundle_key = ?');
2396:     values.push(options.sourceBundleKey);
2397:   }
2398:   if (options?.deployedUrl !== undefined) {
2399:     updates.push('deployed_url = ?');
2400:     values.push(options.deployedUrl);
2401:   }
2402:   if (options?.providerDeploymentId !== undefined) {
2403:     updates.push('provider_deployment_id = ?');
2404:     values.push(options.providerDeploymentId);
2405:   }
2406:   if (options?.cancelRequestedAt !== undefined) {
2407:     updates.push('cancel_requested_at = ?');
2408:     values.push(options.cancelRequestedAt);
2409:   }
2410: 
2411:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed' || status === 'cancelled') {
2412:     const finishedAtForDuration =
2413:       explicitFinishedAt && typeof explicitFinishedAt === 'string' ? explicitFinishedAt : new Date().toISOString();
2414:     if (explicitFinishedAt === undefined) {
2415:       updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
2416:       values.push(finishedAtForDuration);
2417:     }
2418:     updates.push('duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END');
2419:     values.push(finishedAtForDuration);
2420:   }
2421: 
2422:   values.push(deploymentId);
2423:   let whereClause = 'id = ?';
2424:   if (options?.workspaceId) {
2425:     whereClause += ' AND workspace_id = ?';
2426:     values.push(options.workspaceId);
2427:   }
2428:   if (status === 'running') {
2429:     whereClause += " AND status IN ('queued', 'running')";
2430:   }
2431: 
2432:   await db
2433:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_deployments SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
2434:     .bind(...values)
2435:     .run();
2436: }

2438: export async function markWorkspaceDeploymentSucceededIfNotCancelled(
2439:   db: D1Database,
2440:   input: {
2441:     workspaceId: string;
2442:     deploymentId: string;
2443:     sourceSnapshotSha256: string;
2444:     sourceBundleKey: string;
2445:     deployedUrl: string | null;
2446:     providerDeploymentId: string;
2447:     result: unknown;
2448:     finishedAt: string;
2449:   }
2450: ): Promise<boolean> {
2451:   const updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
2452:   const result = await db
2453:     .prepare(
2454:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2455:        SET status = 'succeeded',
2456:            source_snapshot_sha256 = ?,
2457:            source_bundle_key = ?,
2458:            deployed_url = ?,
2459:            provider_deployment_id = ?,
2460:            result_json = ?,
2461:            error_code = NULL,
2462:            error_message = NULL,
2463:            finished_at = ?,
2464:            duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END,
2465:            updated_at = ?
2466:        WHERE id = ?
2467:          AND workspace_id = ?
2468:          AND status = 'running'
2469:          AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2470:     )
2471:     .bind(
2472:       input.sourceSnapshotSha256,
2473:       input.sourceBundleKey,
2474:       input.deployedUrl,
2475:       input.providerDeploymentId,
2476:       JSON.stringify(input.result),
2477:       input.finishedAt,
2478:       input.finishedAt,
2479:       updatedAt,
2480:       input.deploymentId,
2481:       input.workspaceId
2482:     )
2483:     .run();
2484: 
2485:   return (result.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0;
2486: }

2488: export async function requestWorkspaceDeploymentCancel(
2489:   db: D1Database,
2490:   workspaceId: string,
2491:   deploymentId: string
2492: ): Promise<{ deployment: WorkspaceDeploymentResponse | null; updated: boolean }> {
2493:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2494:   const queuedResult = await db
2495:     .prepare(
2496:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2497:        SET status = 'cancelled',
2498:            cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
2499:            finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
2500:            error_code = NULL,
2501:            error_message = NULL,
2502:            updated_at = ?
2503:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
2504:     )
2505:     .bind(now, now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2506:     .run();
2507: 
2508:   const runningResult = await db
2509:     .prepare(
2510:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2511:        SET cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
2512:            updated_at = ?
2513:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'running' AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2514:     )
2515:     .bind(now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2516:     .run();
2517: 
2518:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(db, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2519: 
2520:   return {
2521:     deployment,
2522:     updated: (queuedResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0 || (runningResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0,
2523:   };
2524: }

2526: export async function appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(

2612: export async function createReviewRun(
2613:   db: D1Database,
2614:   input: CreateReviewRunInput
2615: ): Promise<{ review: ReviewRunResponse; reused: boolean }> {
2616:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2617:   const acceptedHashes = new Set([input.requestPayloadSha256, ...(input.requestPayloadSha256Aliases ?? [])]);
2618:   const existingIdempotency = await db
2619:     .prepare(
2620:       `SELECT review_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2621:        FROM review_run_idempotency
2622:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2623:        LIMIT 1`
2624:     )
2625:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2626:     .first<{ review_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2627: 
2628:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
2629:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256)) {
2630:       throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2631:     }
2632: 
2633:     const existingReview = await getReviewRun(db, existingIdempotency.review_id);
2634:     if (!existingReview) {
2635:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing review ${existingIdempotency.review_id}`);
2636:     }
2637: 
2638:     return { review: existingReview, reused: true };
2639:   }
2640: 
2641:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
2642:     await db
2643:       .prepare('DELETE FROM review_run_idempotency WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?')
2644:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2645:       .run();
2646:   }
2647: 
2648:   const idempotencyWindowStart = new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2649:   const existingReviewByKey = await db
2650:     .prepare(
2651:       `SELECT *
2652:        FROM review_runs
2653:        WHERE workspace_id = ?
2654:          AND idempotency_key = ?
2655:          AND julianday(created_at) >= julianday(?)
2656:        ORDER BY created_at DESC
2657:        LIMIT 1`
2658:     )
2659:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey, idempotencyWindowStart)
2660:     .first<ReviewRunRecord>();
2661: 
2662:   if (existingReviewByKey) {
2663:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingReviewByKey.request_payload_sha256)) {
2664:       throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2665:     }
2666: 
2667:     const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2668:     try {
2669:       await db
2670:         .prepare(
2671:           `INSERT INTO review_run_idempotency (
2672:              id,
2673:              workspace_id,
2674:              idempotency_key,
2675:              review_id,
2676:              request_payload_sha256,
2677:              expires_at
2678:            )
2679:            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2680:         )
2681:         .bind(
2682:           generatePrefixedId('rvid'),
2683:           input.workspaceId,
2684:           input.idempotencyKey,
2685:           existingReviewByKey.id,
2686:           input.requestPayloadSha256,
2687:           expiresAt
2688:         )
2689:         .run();
2690:     } catch (error) {
2691:       if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
2692:         throw error;
2693:       }
2694:     }
2695: 
2696:     return { review: toReviewRunResponse(existingReviewByKey), reused: true };
2697:   }
2698: 
2699:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2700:   const reviewRecord = await db
2701:     .prepare(
2702:       `INSERT INTO review_runs (
2703:          id,
2704:          workspace_id,
2705:          deployment_id,
2706:          target_type,
2707:          mode,
2708:          status,
2709:          idempotency_key,
2710:          request_payload_json,
2711:          request_payload_sha256,
2712:          provenance_json,
2713:          created_at,
2714:          updated_at
2715:        )
2716:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
2717:        RETURNING *`
2718:     )
2719:     .bind(
2720:       input.id,
2721:       input.workspaceId,
2722:       input.deploymentId,
2723:       input.targetType,
2724:       input.mode,
2725:       input.idempotencyKey,
2726:       JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
2727:       input.requestPayloadSha256,
2728:       JSON.stringify(input.provenance ?? {}),
2729:       now,
2730:       now
2731:     )
2732:     .first<ReviewRunRecord>();
2733: 
2734:   if (!reviewRecord) {
2735:     throw new Error('Failed to create review run');
2736:   }
2737: 
2738:   try {
2739:     await db
2740:       .prepare(
2741:         `INSERT INTO review_run_idempotency (
2742:            id,
2743:            workspace_id,
2744:            idempotency_key,
2745:            review_id,
2746:            request_payload_sha256,
2747:            expires_at
2748:          )
2749:          VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2750:       )
2751:       .bind(
2752:         generatePrefixedId('rvid'),
2753:         input.workspaceId,
2754:         input.idempotencyKey,
2755:         input.id,
2756:         input.requestPayloadSha256,
2757:         expiresAt
2758:       )
2759:       .run();
2760:   } catch (error) {
2761:     if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
2762:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2763:       throw error;
2764:     }
2765: 
2766:     const concurrent = await db
2767:       .prepare(
2768:         `SELECT review_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2769:          FROM review_run_idempotency
2770:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2771:          LIMIT 1`
2772:       )
2773:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2774:       .first<{ review_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2775: 
2776:     if (!concurrent || concurrent.expires_at <= now) {
2777:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2778:       throw new Error('Review idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
2779:     }
2780: 
2781:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(concurrent.request_payload_sha256)) {
2782:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2783:       throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2784:     }
2785: 
2786:     const existingReview = await getReviewRun(db, concurrent.review_id);
2787:     if (!existingReview) {
2788:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2789:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing review ${concurrent.review_id}`);
2790:     }
2791: 
2792:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2793:     return { review: existingReview, reused: true };
2794:   }
2795: 
2796:   return { review: toReviewRunResponse(reviewRecord), reused: false };
2797: }
2798: 
2799: export async function getReviewRun(db: D1Database, reviewId: string): Promise<ReviewRunResponse | null> {
2800:   const record = await db.prepare('SELECT * FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(reviewId).first<ReviewRunRecord>();
2801:   if (!record) {
2802:     return null;
2803:   }
2804: 
2805:   return toReviewRunResponse(record);

2808: export async function getReviewRunByIdempotency(
2809:   db: D1Database,
2810:   workspaceId: string,
2811:   idempotencyKey: string,
2812:   requestPayloadSha256: string,
2813:   requestPayloadSha256Aliases: string[] = []
2814: ): Promise<ReviewRunResponse | null> {
2815:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2816:   const acceptedHashes = new Set([requestPayloadSha256, ...requestPayloadSha256Aliases]);
2817:   const existingIdempotency = await db
2818:     .prepare(
2819:       `SELECT review_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2820:        FROM review_run_idempotency
2821:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2822:        LIMIT 1`
2823:     )
2824:     .bind(workspaceId, idempotencyKey)
2825:     .first<{ review_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2826: 
2827:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
2828:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256)) {
2829:       throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(idempotencyKey);
2830:     }
2831: 
2832:     const review = await getReviewRun(db, existingIdempotency.review_id);
2833:     if (!review) {
2834:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing review ${existingIdempotency.review_id}`);
2835:     }
2836: 
2837:     return review;
2838:   }
2839: 
2840:   const idempotencyWindowStart = new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2841:   const existingReview = await db
2842:     .prepare(
2843:       `SELECT *
2844:        FROM review_runs
2845:        WHERE workspace_id = ?
2846:          AND idempotency_key = ?
2847:          AND julianday(created_at) >= julianday(?)
2848:        ORDER BY created_at DESC
2849:        LIMIT 1`
2850:     )
2851:     .bind(workspaceId, idempotencyKey, idempotencyWindowStart)
2852:     .first<ReviewRunRecord>();
2853: 
2854:   if (!existingReview) {
2855:     return null;
2856:   }
2857: 
2858:   if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingReview.request_payload_sha256)) {
2859:     throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(idempotencyKey);
2860:   }
2861: 
2862:   return toReviewRunResponse(existingReview);
2863: }

2865: export async function getReviewRunRequestPayload(

2868: ): Promise<Record<string, unknown> | null> {

2885:     return {};
